channel.title: HypeRate Desktop — Blog
channel.description: News, guides, and updates for HypeRate Desktop — the free live heart rate overlay for streamers and athletes.

item.title: The Best Free Heart Rate Overlay for Streamers & Gamers — HypeRate Desktop
item.description: Learn how to display your live BPM on screen while streaming or gaming. A complete guide to setting up HypeRate Desktop — the free, always-on-top overlay for macOS, Windows, and Linux.
item.dc:creator: HypeRate
